professional_awards.title: First Class Honours (BSc Computer Science)
professional_awards.japanese_title: 優等（学士：コンピュータサイエンス）
professional_awards.description: Graduated with First Class Honours in Computer Science.
professional_awards.japanese_description: コンピュータサイエンス学士を優等（First Class Honours）で修了。
professional_awards.impact: Strong academic foundation for research engineering and production ML systems.
professional_awards.japanese_impact: リサーチエンジニアリングと本番MLシステムに必要な強固な基礎を形成。

professional_awards.title: Production LLM platform & semantic search at scale
professional_awards.japanese_title: 大規模LLM基盤とセマンティック検索の本番運用
professional_awards.japanese_organization: 楽天グループ株式会社
professional_awards.description: Delivered and hardened retrieval-augmented workflows, evaluation loops, and routing policies for multimodal and text-heavy products used by large customer volumes.
professional_awards.japanese_description: 大規模トラフィックを扱うプロダクト向けに、RAG型ワークフロー、評価ループ、マルチモーダル・テキスト用途のルーティング方針を本番品質まで仕上げて提供。
professional_awards.project_related: Generative AI services & search quality programs
professional_awards.japanese_project_related: 生成AIサービス・検索品質プログラム
professional_awards.impact: Improved answer relevance, lowered latency regressions through tighter eval gates, and standardized prompt + tool-use patterns for teams shipping quickly.
professional_awards.japanese_impact: 回答の関連性向上、評価ゲート強化によるレイテンシ劣化の抑制、高速リリースチーム向けのプロンプト・ツール利用パターンの標準化に貢献。

professional_awards.title: Vision & deep learning pipelines for production
professional_awards.japanese_title: 本番向けビジョン・深層学習パイプライン
professional_awards.japanese_category: リサーチエンジニアリング
professional_awards.description: Built training and inference stacks for perception models, with focus on reproducibility, dataset hygiene, and rigorous offline/online validation before release.
professional_awards.japanese_description: 知覚モデル向けの学習・推論スタックを構築。再現性、データセット管理、リリース前のオフライン／オンライン検証を重視。
professional_awards.japanese_project_related: コンピュータビジョン・パターン認識プログラム
professional_awards.impact: Raised model reliability and experimentation velocity through shared tooling, benchmarks, and review rituals adopted across contributing teams.
professional_awards.japanese_impact: 共通ツール、ベンチマーク、レビュー文化によりモデルの信頼性と実験スピードを向上。

professional_awards.title: Marketplace ML: data, models, and user-facing quality
professional_awards.japanese_title: マーケットプレイスML：データ・モデル・UX品質
professional_awards.description: Shipped ML-driven features spanning recommendations, search, and multimedia signals; automated feature pipelines and owned model monitoring basics for stable rollout.
professional_awards.japanese_description: 推薦・検索・マルチメディア信号にまたがるML機能をリリース。特徴量パイプラインの自動化と安定リリースのためのモニタリング基盤を担当。
professional_awards.japanese_project_related: C2Cマーケットプレイスのランキング・検索
professional_awards.impact: Reduced manual labeling toil, improved cold-start handling, and tightened feedback loops between product metrics and model iterations.
professional_awards.japanese_impact: ラベリング工数削減、コールドスタート改善、プロダクト指標とモデル改善のフィードバックループ強化。

certifications.name: AWS Certified Machine Learning - Specialty
certifications.description: Validates ability to design, implement, deploy, and maintain cost-optimized ML solutions on AWS.
certifications.japanese_description: AWS上でコスト最適化されたMLソリューションの設計・実装・デプロイ・運用能力を証明。

certifications.name: Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer
certifications.description: End-to-end ML on Google Cloud: data pipelines, training, deployment, monitoring, and responsible AI considerations.
certifications.japanese_description: Google Cloud上のML全工程：データパイプライン、学習、デプロイ、監視、責任あるAIの考慮。

certifications.name: TensorFlow Developer Certificate
certifications.description: Practical TensorFlow skills for building and tuning neural networks with the Keras API.
certifications.japanese_description: Keras APIを用いたニューラルネットの構築とチューニングに関する実践スキル。

certifications.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer Associate
certifications.japanese_name: Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer Associate
certifications.description: Azure AI services, custom ML, and responsible AI patterns for enterprise deployments.
certifications.japanese_description: Azure AIサービス、カスタムML、エンタープライズ向け責任あるAIパターン。

certifications.name: NVIDIA DLI: Fundamentals of Deep Learning
certifications.japanese_name: NVIDIA DLI: Fundamentals of Deep Learning
certifications.description: Hands-on GPU acceleration, CNN fundamentals, and efficient training workflows.
certifications.japanese_description: 実践的なGPU活用、CNN基礎、効率的な学習ワークフロー。
